info.title: Harness NextGen Software Delivery Platform API Reference
info.description: This is the Open Api Spec 3 for the Platform Service. This is under active development. Beware of the breaking change with respect to the generated code stub.

tags.name: Account Resource Groups
tags.description: This contains APIs for performing CRUD operations on Account level Resource Groups.

tags.name: Organization Resource Groups
tags.description: This contains APIs for performing CRUD operations on Organization level Resource Groups.

tags.name: Project Resource Groups
tags.description: This contains APIs for performing CRUD operations on Project level Resource Groups.

tags.name: Filter Resource Groups
tags.description: This contains the filter endpoint for Resource Groups.

get.description: Returns a list of Resource Groups present in the Account scope.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Pagination page number strategy: Specify the page number within the paginated collection related to the number of items on each page.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Pagination: Number of items to return.

parameters.name: search_term
parameters.description: This would be used to filter resources having attributes matching the search term.

parameters.name: Harness-Account
parameters.description: Slug field of the account the resource is scoped to. This is required for Authorization methods other than the x-api-key header. If you are using the x-api-key header, this can be skipped.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Parameter on the basis of which sorting is done.

parameters.name: order
parameters.description: Order on the basis of which sorting is done.

Link.description: Links to related resources, in the format defined by [RFC 5988](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc5988#section-5). This will include a link with relation type `next` to the next page, if there is a next page.

value.name: Example Resource Group
value.description: This is an Example Resource Group

resource-group-list-response.value:
- slug: example_resource_group
  name: Example Resource Group
  color: '#0063F7'
  tags:
    example-tag-1: example-tag-1-value
    example-tag-2: example-tag-2-value
  description: This is an Example Resource Group
  allowed_scope_levels:
    - account
  included_scope:
    - filter: EXCLUDING_CHILD_SCOPES
      account: sample_account
      org: sample_organization
      project: sample_project
  resource_filter:
    - resource_type: resource
      identifiers:
        - example_resource
      attribute_name: resource_attribute
      attribute_values:
        - example_resource_attribute
  include_all: false
  harness_managed: true
  created: 1234567890
  updated: 1234567890

color.description: Color associated with the Resource Group.

allowed_scope_levels.description: Allowed scope levels for this Resource Group.

included_scope.description: Included scopes for the resources belonging to the Resource Group.

resource_filter.description: Specifies the actual resources present in the Resource Group.

include_all_resources.description: Boolean value for including all resources in Resource Group.

harness_managed.description: This indicates if this Resource Group is managed by Harness or not. If true, Harness can manage and modify this Resource Group.

updated.description: Last modification timestamp for Resource Group.

example-resource-group.name: Example_Resource Group
example-resource-group.description: This is an Example Resource Group

color.description: Color associated with the Resource Group.

included_scope.description: Included scopes for the resources belonging to the Resource Group.

resource_filter.description: Specifies the actual resources present in the Resource Group.

include_all_resources.description: Boolean value for including all resources in Resource Group.

resource-group-request.name: Example_Resource Group
resource-group-request.description: This is an Example Resource Group

ResourceGroupScope.title: Resource Group Scope
ResourceGroupScope.description: Included scopes for the Resources belonging to the Resource Group

attribute_name.description: Attribute name on the basis of which filtering will be done.

ResourceSelectorFilter.title: Resource Selector Filter
ResourceSelectorFilter.description: Filter by whether the Resource Group has a particular Resource.

ResourceGroupFilterRequestBody.title: Resource Group Filter Request Body

search_term.description: Filter Resource Group matching by identifier/name.

resource_selector_filter.description: Filter based on whether it has a particular Resource.

managed_filter.description: Filter based on whether the Resource Group is Harness Managed.

ResourceGroupFilterRequestBody.description: Filter request body for Resource Groups.

Link.description: Links to related resources, in the format defined by [RFC 5988](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc5988#section-5). This will include a link with relation type `next` to the next page, if there is a next page.

    resource_slug: example_resource
managed_filter: NO_FILTER
